title: Conjecture Decision
domain: formal pattern and conjecture discovery v1
scientificQuestion: Can richer formal candidate generators produce a nontrivial bounded conjecture family that survives stronger filters, counterexample pressure, holdouts, proof-pressure scoring, and replay?
humanReadableSummary: Final classification: failed_formal_discovery_attempt; no selected family satisfied nontriviality, counterexample resistance, bounded/holdout support, replay, and proof-pressure requirements.
disclaimer: Bounded computational formal result only. It reports finite evidence and failure modes, not a checked proof, outside-party review, or general mathematical validity.
